Zhu Han śúĪśľĘ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Han (śúĪśľĘ)was born in Henei. Treated rudely by Han Fu, got revenge by attacking the house and breaking the legs of Han Fu‚Äôs son. Zhu Han was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty and Yuan Shao.
